audit_result.proof_trace: Blobs from EL are wrapped with KzgVerifiedBlob::from_execution_verified() which skips KZG proof verification entirely. Same issue in v2 path where blobs_to_data_column_sidecars uses EL-provided proofs without validation before propagation.
audit_result.attack_scenario: Malicious or compromised EL sends invalid blob-commitment pairs. CL accepts them without verification, propagates to network, causing consensus splits when honest nodes reject invalid blobs.

PROP-57888860-asm-003.text: Engine API blob data is semi-trusted; blobs from EL must still pass KZG commitment verification.
PROP-57888860-asm-003.assertion: forall blob from EL: verify_blob_kzg_proof(blob, commitment) == true before propagation
